flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Montreat College rose 24% between 2021 and 2024 ($29.5k → $36.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Montreat College rose 24% between 2021 and 2024 ($29.5k → $36.5k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Montreat College fell 23% between 2021 and 2024 (76.8% → 58.9%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Montreat College fell 10% between 2021 and 2024 (851 → 762).
